caption: A presentation slide describes how a Community Production Account (CPA) can be used, featuring the header text "CPA can fund housing trusts." Below the header, a series of three ascending blue-bordered boxes illustrate different funding applications. The first box states "Applies for specific program/project," the second says "Applies for no specific purpose," and the third indicates "Transfers set % each year." A yellow horizontal bar runs across the bottom of the frame, containing small profile icons of participants and the initials "MHP." In the upper right corner, a small video feed shows a man wearing a dark suit and white shirt. The scene remains static across all frames, with the same text, graphics, and video feed appearing consistently, indicating a pause or a slow transition during a digital presentation.
